content:
Goal:
AOE kill all mobs consistently turn 1.

Minimum requirement:
- Goliath (Awaker) 
- Elevated Focus (Wheel) e3 
- Aged (Wheel) e3
- Whisper (Wheel) e3
- Little Wish (Posse)
Everything else is optional to improve performance.

How it works:
Goliath exalt alone can clear all early game mobs, this setup helps Goliath get exalt. 
Elevated Focus 15 aliemus + Whisper 50 aliemus + Little Wish 35 aliemus = 100 aliemus
Aged is there so you can use Little Wish at the start of the battle. 

Gameplay:
The hardest battle will be the first battle as you don't have any aliemus. Try to win while keeping Goliath as the one with lowest aliemus so Whisper hits Goliath. 

Play order:
Click the blue tentacle and turn it red - >
Use Little Wish and select Goliath - > Goliath exalt and select Usurp - > play Goliath's cards (if you're lucky with giant's blade you can play all 3)

After early game:
When Goliath damage is no longer enough, you'll have to invest into caecus and tulu. Caecus counter is a great boss killer. Tulu gives good buff and aoe. Goliath becomes more of a support dps using exalt to buff Caecus 2 cost card.

**How to Try Special Awakers you haven't unlocked yet**

You can use the Support function in any mode that has it. Example, go to **Interlude** then **Phantasmal Dive **

Click the button highlighted in Red circle below.

*Note: Using this Support feature is one weekly task in the battle pass*
